title: App Settings - General - Account
scenario: Account section under App Settings > General displays "Your Account" with Log in button and "You are not currently logged in" message for quest users, along with Share Data toggle
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. From the Home screen, tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to App Settings → General.
3. In the General settings, locate and tap the "Account" option.
5. Verify that a "Your Account" section is displayed with the message "You are not currently logged in" and an active "Log in" button.

6. Scroll down (if needed) and verify that a "Share Data" section is present with a toggle button and a description stating that sharing basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) helps improve the experience, and that no personal information is shared with third parties.
7. Tap the back button (either the system back button or the back arrow in the app UI) to return to the App Settings page.
expected: The Account section expands to show a \"Your Account\" section with the message \"You are not currently logged in\" and an active \"Log in\" button. A \"Share Data\" section is present with a toggle button and description about sharing basic device/app info (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) to improve the experience, noting no personal information is shared with third parties. Tapping back returns the user to the App Settings page.
